title: PowerToys Feature Shortcuts
summary: Current PowerToys feature shortcuts and activation methods, including utilities that use context menus or tray actions instead of global hotkeys.

items.label: Quick Accent
items.detail: Hold character key, then Space or Left/Right Arrow

items.label: Peek
items.detail: Space (while file is selected in File Explorer)

items.label: Grab And Move
items.detail: Hold Alt and drag: left-click moves, right-click resizes (modifier configurable)

items.label: Find My Mouse
items.detail: Default activation: press Left Ctrl twice (other methods available)

items.label: CursorWrap
items.detail: Custom activation shortcut (configurable in Mouse Utilities)

items.label: Mouse Jump
items.detail: Custom activation shortcut (configurable in Mouse Utilities)

items.label: Mouse Pointer Crosshairs
items.detail: Custom activation shortcut (configurable in Mouse Utilities)

sections.title: Utilities without a global default hotkey

items.label: Awake
items.detail: No global shortcut. Use PowerToys Settings or tray menu.

items.label: Command Not Found
items.detail: No hotkey. Works in PowerShell when a command is not found.

items.label: Environment Variables
items.detail: No global shortcut. Open from PowerToys Settings.

items.label: File Explorer add-ons
items.detail: No hotkey. Works through File Explorer preview/thumbnail integration.

items.label: File Locksmith
items.detail: No hotkey. Use File Explorer right-click context menu.

items.label: Hosts File Editor
items.detail: No hotkey. Open from PowerToys tray icon menu.

items.label: Image Resizer
items.detail: No hotkey. Use File Explorer right-click context menu.

items.label: Keyboard Manager
items.detail: No launch hotkey. Configure remaps in PowerToys Settings.

items.label: Light Switch
items.detail: No global shortcut. Configure automatic schedule in settings.

items.label: New+
items.detail: No hotkey. Use File Explorer right-click context menu.

items.label: Power Display
items.detail: Activation shortcut is configurable in settings (no documented default).

items.label: PowerRename
items.detail: No hotkey. Use File Explorer right-click context menu.
